briefdescription.para: This function discovers the topology and finds the actual number of sinks.

detaileddescription.para: It enables streams corresponding to each sink found during topology discovery.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDp instance.

briefdescription.para: This function calculates the video bandwidth and link bandwidth in single stream and millstream mode.

detaileddescription.para: It checks whether the link bandwidth is not over-subscribed for video bandwidth.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDp instance.
is the new number of bits per color to use.
is one of the enumerated standard video modes defined in xvidc.h file.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if link bandwidth is not over-subscribed.

simplesect.para: Check that the stream allocation will succeed based on capabilities. Don't go through training and allocation sequence if the pre-calculations indicate that it will fail

briefdescription.para: This function retrieves preferred timing mode information from the EDID to identify video mode or resolution.

parameterdescription.para: is the supplied base EDID to retrieve timing values.

simplesect.para: Id of a supported video mode.

briefdescription.para: This function configures DisplayPort video packaging clock control bit ( VIDEO_PACKING_CLOCK_CONTROL) if bpc is 12/16.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDp instance.
is the new number of bits per color to use.

memberdef.argsstring: (XDp *InstancePtr, u8 TransportMode, u8 Bpc, XVidC_VideoMode VidMode)
memberdef.name: XDpTxSs_DpTxStart

briefdescription.para: This function configures DisplayPort sub-core with preferred resolution read from sink or user set resolution, bits per color in SST/MST mode.

detaileddescription.para: In MST mode, if sinks are more than two, it re-orders the sinks if belongs to same tiled display topology. It trains the link and allocates stream payloads for single stream (SST) or multi-stream transport mode (MST). In MST mode, discovers the topology and finds the actual number of sinks to which associates streams.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDp instance.

specifies whether multiple/single steam to be sent over the main link.
TransportMode = 1 (for Multi-Stream Transport)
TransportMode = 0 (for Single Stream Transport)
is the new number of bits per color to use.
is one of the enumerated standard video modes defined in xvidc.h file.

briefdescription.para: This function checks if the link needs training and runs the training sequence if training is required based on the flags, indicates to use maximum RX capabilities or user specified link rate, lane count during training.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDp instance.

is a flag indicates whether maximum capabilities to be used during link training.
TRUE - Use maximum RX capabilities.
FALSE - Use custom capabilities.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS the if main link was successfully established.

briefdescription.para: This file contains a minimal set of functions for the DisplayPort core to configure in TX mode of operation.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 sha 01/29/15 Initial release. 1.00 sha 07/21/15 Renamed file name with prefix xdptxss_* and function names with prefix XDpTxSs_*. 2.00 sha 08/07/15 Added support for customized main stream attributes for Single Steam Transport and Multi-Stream Transport. 2.00 sha 09/28/15 Removed cross checking user set resolution with RX EDID. 4.0 aad 05/13/16 Use asynchronous clock mode by default. 5.0 tu 08/03/17 Enabled video packing for bpc > 10 5.0 aad 09/08/17 Case to handle HTotal > 4095, PPC = 1 in AXIStream Mode. 6.4 rg 09/26/20 Added support for YUV420 color format.
